name: Infineon
tagline: Leading Semiconductor Solutions for Automotive, Industrial & IoT Applications
description: Infineon Technologies AG is a German semiconductor manufacturer and global leader in power systems, IoT, and automotive electronics. Founded in 1999 and headquartered in Neubiberg, Germany.
seoDescription: Infineon Technologies core distributor in China. Authorized supplier of IGBT modules, MOSFETs, SiC devices, AURIX MCUs, XMC microcontrollers, and XENSIV sensors. Competitive pricing, in-stock supply, technical support for automotive, industrial, and renewable energy applications.
longDescription:
As a core distributor of Infineon Technologies products, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive access to Infineon's extensive portfolio of semiconductor solutions. Infineon's technology leadership spans over two decades of innovation in power semiconductors, microcontrollers, sensors, and security ICs.

Infineon's product portfolio includes industry-leading IGBT modules, MOSFETs, SiC (Silicon Carbide) devices, GaN (Gallium Nitride) transistors, AURIX automotive microcontrollers, XMC industrial MCUs, and the comprehensive XENSIV sensor family. These components power applications across automotive electrification, renewable energy systems, industrial automation, data centers, and consumer electronics.

Key technology platforms include the ECONODUAL and PrimePACK IGBT module families for industrial motor drives and renewable energy conversion, OptiMOS and CoolMOS power MOSFETs for efficient power conversion, AURIX TriCore microcontrollers for automotive safety-critical applications, and the industry-leading XENSIV sensor portfolio for IoT and industrial applications.

qualityCommitment: BeiLuo Electronics is committed to providing 100% genuine Infineon Technologies products. faqs.question: Is BeiLuo Electronics an authorized Infineon distributor?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is a core distributor of Infineon Technologies products with over 20 years of partnership history. As a core distributor, we have direct access to Infineon's global supply chain and technical resources. Our authorization covers the full range of Infineon products including IGBT modules, MOSFETs, AURIX MCUs, XMC microcontrollers, and XENSIV sensors. We provide genuine products with full traceability documentation, ensuring 100% authenticity for every component we supply.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our Infineon product catalog to find the components you need, or contact our sales team for volume pricing and technical support.

faqs.question: What makes Infineon different from other semiconductor manufacturers?
faqs.answer: Infineon Technologies stands out as a global leader in power systems, IoT, and automotive electronics. Founded in 1999 and headquartered in Neubiberg, Germany, Infineon has pioneered breakthrough technologies including trench/field-stop IGBT technology, CoolMOS superjunction MOSFETs, and CoolSiC silicon carbide devices. Their AURIX TriCore microcontrollers are the industry standard for automotive safety-critical applications, while their XENSIV sensor portfolio leads in precision sensing. Infineon's commitment to quality is demonstrated through ISO 9001, ISO 14001, IATF 16949, and ISO 26262 certifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore Infineon's core product categories to find solutions for your automotive, industrial, or renewable energy applications.

faqs.question: Why should I choose BeiLuo as my Infineon distributor?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics offers distinct advantages as your Infineon distributor: (1) Genuine Products Guaranteed - 100% authentic components with original packaging and traceable documentation; (2) In-Stock Supply - Extensive inventory of popular Infineon part numbers with same-day dispatch available; (3) Competitive Pricing - Volume-based pricing tiers and price matching for qualified opportunities; (4) Technical Support - Dedicated FAE team with deep Infineon product expertise for design-in support; (5) Fast Shipping - Global shipping network with offices in Hong Kong, Shenzhen, Shanghai, and Beijing; (6) Long-term Partnership - Over 20 years of semiconductor distribution experience ensuring supply continuity.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team today for a quote on your Infineon component requirements and experience our professional service.

faqs.question: What industries does Infineon primarily serve?
faqs.answer: Infineon Technologies serves four primary industries with specialized semiconductor solutions: (1) Automotive - Electric vehicle powertrains, ADAS systems, battery management, and vehicle electrification with AURIX MCUs and power semiconductors; (2) Industrial - Motor drives, power supplies, factory automation, and industrial IoT with XMC microcontrollers and IGBT modules; (3) Renewable Energy - Solar inverters, wind power converters, and energy storage systems with high-efficiency power modules; (4) IoT & Consumer - Smart home devices, wearables, and mobile accessories with sensors and low-power MCUs. Each industry benefits from Infineon's functional safety certifications and robust product portfolios.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit our solutions page to explore Infineon applications specific to your industry and project requirements.

faqs.question: How does Infineon ensure product quality and reliability?
faqs.answer: Infineon maintains the highest quality standards through comprehensive quality management systems and rigorous testing protocols. All manufacturing facilities are ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certified, with automotive products meeting IATF 16949 requirements. Functional safety is ensured through ISO 26262 certification for automotive electronic systems. Infineon's products undergo extensive reliability testing including high-temperature operating life (HTOL), temperature cycling, humidity testing, and electrical stress testing. Their zero-defect strategy encompasses advanced statistical process control, automated optical inspection, and full traceability from wafer to finished product.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request quality certifications and reliability reports for specific Infineon products by contacting our technical support team.

faqs.question: What is Infineon's market position in the semiconductor industry?
faqs.answer: Infineon Technologies is one of the world's leading semiconductor manufacturers with €14.2 billion in revenue (FY2023) and over 58,600 employees globally. Infineon holds dominant market positions in power semiconductors (#1 globally), automotive semiconductors (#2 globally), and microcontroller units for automotive applications. Their technology leadership spans IGBT modules, MOSFETs, SiC devices, and security ICs. With headquarters in Neubiberg, Germany, and manufacturing facilities worldwide, Infineon serves customers in over 100 countries. Their commitment to innovation is reflected in significant R&D investments driving next-generation technologies.
faqs.decisionGuide: Learn more about Infineon's product portfolio and how their market-leading solutions can benefit your designs.
